changes.text: Unified mobile Settings navigation with Tasks — Settings sub-tabs now use a sleek, horizontally scrollable top bar on mobile instead of hiding in a dropdown.
Hid redundant horizontal Settings tab bar on desktop screens for a cleaner layout, as navigation is already handled by the sidebar.
Fixed site crash on load — the server wake-up check was hitting the wrong URL (/api/api/health/ instead of /api/health/), causing the app to get stuck on the loading screen forever.
Calendar events are now saved to the cloud — they persist across devices and sessions instead of being lost on browser clear.
Daily tasks with a scheduled time now appear on every day in the Calendar view, automatically recurring.
Fixed duplicate 'Show in Calendar' field appearing twice in the task creation form.
Task creation now correctly saves the scheduled time and calendar visibility settings to the server.
Fixed a visual bug that displayed 'NaN' and missing XP requirements on the Rank Progression screen.
Implemented Changelog system to track user-facing game updates directly in MIND OS.
Overhauled ShareCard visual layout to resemble a highly polished trading card.
Rebuilt ShareCard layout with fixed scaling zones to permanently prevent text clipping and overlap.
Redesigned ShareCard to focus purely on the portrait, class, and rank in a minimalist bracketed style.
Resolved ShareCard text clipping issues for long class titles and removed redundant status labels.
Updated Settings to show direct PayPal donation info and removed deprecated support website links.
Synchronized the Sidebar navigation menu with the Settings tab bar, restoring missing sections and removing dead links.
Migrated the local privacy tracking toggle into a robust, cloud-synced backend setting.
Mastery Radar display decoupled to fix connecting-line polygon bug and clipping issues.
Added off-screen rendering support for ShareCard to generate accurate social media stat cards.
Shop consumables now correctly deduct gold and apply effects synchronously with cache invalidation.
Standardized all panels to use consistent GameCard UI components and styling.
Skill Tree Batch 5 completion: activated final tier nodes for advanced character builds.
Adjusted XP curve scaling for high-level tasks to prevent runaway progression.
